title: Weight Shift Phrase
prompt:
Create a production-ready Weight Shift Phrase using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original editorial text effect presents one concise sentence with three selectable clauses: Observe, Decide, and Record. Selecting a clause gives that phrase a heavier weight, coral underline, and a small explanatory caption while the remaining words stay readable at normal weight. The chosen clause must be named in text so the visual emphasis is never the only state signal. Use a light Bento composition with #F4F5F6 stage, white surface, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F support copy. Coral is the only bright accent; the card and text treatment must not use gradients.

Use native 44px buttons with aria-pressed in a labelled group and a polite aria-live caption. Click, Enter, and Space select a phrase. Animate only font-weight-adjacent scale and underline transform with a spring using stiffness 340 and damping 28; fade the caption in over 150ms ease-out. Keep the data deterministic and local: no timers, random values, storage, remote data, network requests, browser globals, or dynamic measurement. Prefer opacity and transform motion.

At 320px, allow the sentence and controls to wrap cleanly without reducing readability; at a wide detail preview, retain an editorial line length. Include visible 3px focus rings, logical tab order, AA contrast, and explicit selected text. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by showing the underline immediately with only a short opacity fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code, a runnable pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML:

Decide Record

*/ .weight-shift{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;color:#111}.weight-shift button{border:0;border-bottom:4px solid transparent;background:#fff;color:#111;font-size:24px;font-weight:400}.weight-shift button[aria-pressed=true]{border-bottom-color:#ff6b5f;font-weight:900}.weight-shift button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.weight-shift *{transition:none}}
